items.title: One head-scratching idea that gets repeated endlessly: the new TAM for AI is the size of the hu…
items.content: One head-scratching idea that gets repeated endlessly: the new TAM for AI is the size of the human labor market, dollar-for-dollar. Many trillions! Just for like any labor automation technology in history, the price of AI services will be the marginal cost + a normal margin.
